zh.Lochowe, Argyllshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍
zh.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christina Macdougall於1265年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Alexander Macdougall15歲，母親Julienne Comyn14歲。她於1290年9月26日與Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1294年在她的家鄉享年29歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.Lochowe, Argyllshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍
zh-hans.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christina Macdougall于1265年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Alexander Macdougall15岁，母亲Julienne Comyn14岁。她于1290年9月26日与Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1294年在她的家乡享年29岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Macdougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christina Macdougall was born in 1265, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Alexander Macdougall, was 15 and her mother, Julienne Comyn, was 14. She married Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont on 26 September 1290, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1294, in her hometown, at the age of 29, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christina Macdougall est née en 1265, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Alexander Macdougall, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Julienne Comyn, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont le 26 septembre 1290, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1294, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christina Macdougall 1265 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Macdougall 15 und ihre Mutter Julienne Comyn 14. Sie hat am 26. September 1290 in Argyll, Scotland Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1294 im Alter von 29 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christina Macdougall è nata il nel 1265 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Macdougall, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Julienne Comyn, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont il 26 settembre 1290, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1294, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Christina Macdougallが1265年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Alexander Macdougallは15歳，母Julienne Comynは14歳であった。1290年9月26日にスコットランドアルグイルでMalcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1294年に故郷で29歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christina Macdougall(이)가 1265년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Macdougall(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julienne Comyn(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1290년 9월 26일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1294년 그녀의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

mn.Lochowe, Argyllshire, Scotland: Lochawe, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christina Macdougall nasceu em 1265, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Macdougall, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Julienne Comyn, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont em 26 de setembro de 1290, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1294, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christina Macdougall родилась в 1265 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Macdougall было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Julienne Comyn, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont 26 сентября 1290 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1294 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Christina Macdougall nació en 1265, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Macdougall, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Julienne Comyn, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Malcolm Lamont 2nd Chief of Clan Lamont el 26 de septiembre de 1290, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1294, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Scotland.
